tasks.title: Market types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for Market Intelligence and Competitor Intelligence modules.

**Types file** (`market-types.ts`):
- `MarketInsight` — id, type ('price_change'|'regulation'|'tender'|'trend'|'risk'), title, description, impact, relevance (number 0-1), companies (string[]), created_at
- `MarketAlert` — id, level ('info'|'warning'|'critical'), message, acknowledged (boolean), created_at, insight_title, insight_type, relevance
- `MarketSource` — name, last_fetched (string|null), active (boolean), id?, url?, source_type? ('rss'|'api'|'web')
- `MarketDashboard` — insights: MarketInsight[], alerts: MarketAlert[], stats: { by_type: Record<string,number>, total_insights: number, active_alerts: number }, sources: MarketSource[]
- `Competitor` — id, name, krs, industry, watch_level ('active'|'passive'|'archived'), recent_signals_30d, high_severity, latest_analysis?, analysis_date?
- `CompetitorSignal` — id, competitor (string), type ('krs_change'|'hiring'|'media'|'tender'|'financial'), title, description, severity ('low'|'medium'|'high'), date (string|null), source_url
- `SwotAnalysis` — competitor (string), swot: { strengths[], weaknesses[], threats[], opportunities[], summary }, signals_count
- `CompetitorsResponse` — competitors: Competitor[], total, active_count
- `ScanResult` — success, fetch?: { sources_checked, new_items }, analysis?: { insights_created, alerts_created }
- `CompetitorScanResult` — success, signals_collected, competitors_analyzed, analysis_summaries[], landscape

**API client** (`market.ts`):
Use `customFetch<T>()` from `./base`. Functions:
- `getMarketDashboard(params?: { days?: number })` → GET `/market/dashboard`
- `scanMarket()` → POST `/market/scan`
- `getMarketInsights(params?: { insight_type?: string, min_relevance?: number, limit?: number })` → GET `/market/insights`
- `getMarketAlerts(params?: { acknowledged?: boolean })` → GET `/market/alerts`
- `addMarketSource(params: { name: string, url: string, source_type?: string })` → POST `/market/sources` (NOTE: params go as query string, not body)
- `getCompetitors()` → GET `/competitors`
- `addCompetitor(params: { name: string, krs_number?: string, industry?: string, watch_level?: string })` → POST `/competitors` (NOTE: params as query string)
- `scanCompetitors()` → POST `/competitors/scan`
- `getCompetitorAnalysis(competitorId: number)` → GET `/competitors/${competitorId}/analysis`
- `getCompetitorSignals(params?: { competitor_id?: number, signal_type?: string, days?: number })` → GET `/competitors/signals`

Update `index.ts` to export from `market.ts` and `market-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Finance types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for Finance, Costs, and Strategic Goals modules.

**Types file** (`finance-types.ts`):
- `CompanyFinance` — latest_metrics: Record<string, { value: number, currency: string, period_start: string, source: string }>, budget_utilization: BudgetUtilization[], alerts: FinanceAlert[]
- `BudgetUtilization` — category, planned (number), actual (number), pct (number), currency
- `FinanceAlert` — alert_type, description, severity, created_at
- `FinanceDashboard` — companies: Record<string, CompanyFinance>, active_alerts (number), api_costs: ApiCosts, total_budget_utilization (number)
- `ApiCosts` — monthly: { month: string, total_usd: number, api_calls: number }[], avg_monthly_usd, trend (string), current_month_forecast_usd
- `CostBudget` — daily_total_usd, budgets: BudgetScope[], alerts_today: CostAlert[]
- `BudgetScope` — scope, limit_usd, spent_usd, pct (number), hard_limit (boolean), status ('ok'|'warning'|'exceeded')
- `CostAlert` — scope, type, message, at (string)
- `GoalsSummary` — total_goals, by_status: Record<string,number>, by_area: Record<string,number>, top_risks: any[], recently_achieved: any[], upcoming_deadlines: any[]
- `StrategicGoal` — id, title, description, company, area ('business'|'trading'|'operations'|'people'|'technology'|'wellbeing'), target_value, current_value, unit, deadline, status ('on_track'|'at_risk'|'behind'|'achieved'|'cancelled'), pct_complete, sub_goals?, dependencies?, progress?: GoalProgress[]
- `GoalProgress` — date, value, note?
- `CostEstimate` — direct_cost_pln, roi_ratio, payback_months, recommendation, [any other fields]

**API client** (`finance.ts`):
- `getFinanceDashboard(params?: { company?: string })` → GET `/finance`
- `addFinanceMetric(data: { company: string, metric_type: string, value: number, period_start: string, period_end: string, source?: string })` → POST `/finance/metric`
- `addBudget(data: { company: string, category: string, planned_amount: number, period_start: string, period_end: string })` → POST `/finance/budget`
- `estimateCost(data: { description: string })` → POST `/finance/estimate-cost`
- `getCostBudget()` → GET `/costs/budget`
- `getGoals()` → GET `/goals`
- `getGoalDetail(goalId: number)` → GET `/goals/${goalId}`
- `createGoal(data: { title: string, target_value: number, unit?: string, deadline?: string, company?: string, area?: string })` → POST `/goals`
- `updateGoalProgress(goalId: number, data: { value: number, note?: string })` → POST `/goals/${goalId}/progress`

Update `index.ts` to export from `finance.ts` and `finance-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Process Intelligence types + API client
tasks.description:
Create TypeScript types and API client functions for Process Intelligence (including Apps, Flows, Workforce, Tech Radar).

**Types file** (`process-intel-types.ts`):
- `ProcessIntelDashboard` — business_lines: { business_lines: BusinessLine[] }, apps: AppInventoryItem[], optimizations: OptimizationsSummary, workforce_automation?: any, tech_radar?: any
- `BusinessLine` — id, name, description, key_entities (string[]), importance ('low'|'medium'|'high'|'critical'), signals (number), status ('active'|'archived'|'merged'), discovered_at
- `DiscoveredProcess` — id, name, description, process_type ('decision'|'approval'|'reporting'|'trading'|'compliance'|'communication'|'operational'), frequency ('daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'quarterly'|'ad_hoc'), participants, steps, tools_used, automation_potential (number 0-100), automation_notes, status ('discovered'|'confirmed'|'automated'|'archived')
- `AppInventoryItem` — name, category, mentions (number), replacement, status ('not_planned'|'planned'|'partial'|'replaced'|'not_replaceable')
- `AppDeepAnalysis` — extends AppInventoryItem + id, vendor, discovery_sources, supported_processes, user_details: { user, role, usage_frequency }[], data_flow_types, cost_monthly_pln, cost_yearly_pln, replacement_feasibility (number), replacement_plan, tco_analysis
- `AppCostSummary` — total_monthly_pln, total_yearly_pln, cost_breakdown: any[]
- `AppRankingItem` — rank, app_name, replacement_priority, annual_savings, feasibility, [other fields]
- `DataFlow` — flow, source, channel, frequency ('daily'|'weekly'|'monthly'|'occasional'), volume (number), automation ('manual'|'semi_auto'|'automated'|'gilbertus'), bottleneck ('low'|'medium'|'high')
- `OptimizationsSummary` — total_plans, total_time_savings_hours, total_cost_savings_pln, plans: any[]
- `EmployeeWorkProfile` — person_name, person_role, work_activities: WorkActivity[], automatable_pct, replaceability_score, automation_roadmap: AutomationTask[]
- `WorkActivity` — activity, category, frequency, hours_per_week, automation_potential (number)
- `AutomationTask` — task, gilbertus_module, dev_hours, savings_monthly_pln, priority
- `AutomationOverview` — total_employees, analyzed, avg_automatable_pct, top_automation_candidates: any[]
- `AutomationRoadmap` — total_initiatives, roadmap: { quarter: string, initiatives: any[] }[]
- `TechSolution` — id, name, solution_type ('build'|'buy'|'extend'), estimated_dev_hours, estimated_cost_pln, estimated_annual_savings_pln, roi_ratio, payback_months, strategic_alignment_score, status ('proposed'|'approved'|'in_development'|'deployed'|'rejected'), risk_notes
- `TechRadarResponse` — by_type: Record<string, TechSolution[]>, by_status: Record<string, TechSolution[]>, top_10_by_roi: TechSolution[], total_solutions, total_estimated_savings_pln
- `TechRoadmap` — roadmap: { quarter: string, solutions: TechSolution[] }[], total_quarters, total_dev_hours
- `TechAlignment` — strategic_goals: { goal_id: number, goal_name: string, supporting_solutions: TechSolution[] }[], total_alignment_coverage
- `DiscoveryResult` — message, business_lines|processes|apps_found (number), new (number), timestamp

**API client** (`process-intel.ts`):
- `getProcessDashboard()` → GET `/process-intel/dashboard`
- `getBusinessLines()` → GET `/process-intel/business-lines`
- `discoverBusinessLines()` → POST `/process-intel/discover`
- `getProcesses(params?: { process_type?: string })` → GET `/process-intel/processes`
- `mineProcesses()` → POST `/process-intel/mine`
- `getApps()` → GET `/process-intel/apps`
- `scanApps()` → POST `/process-intel/scan-apps`
- `scanAppsDeep()` → POST `/process-intel/scan-apps-deep`
- `getAppAnalysis()` → GET `/process-intel/app-analysis`
- `getAppDetail(appId: number)` → GET `/process-intel/app-analysis/${appId}`
- `getAppCosts()` → POST `/process-intel/app-costs`
- `getAppRanking()` → GET `/process-intel/app-replacement-ranking`
- `getFlows()` → GET `/process-intel/flows`
- `mapFlows()` → POST `/process-intel/map-flows`
- `getOptimizations()` → GET `/process-intel/optimizations`
- `generateOptimizations()` → POST `/process-intel/plan`
- `analyzeEmployee(personSlug: string)` → POST `/process-intel/analyze-employee/${personSlug}`
- `analyzeAllEmployees(params?: { organization?: string })` → POST `/process-intel/analyze-all-employees`
- `getWorkProfile(personSlug: string)` → GET `/process-intel/work-profile/${personSlug}`
- `getAutomationOverview()` → GET `/process-intel/automation-overview`
- `getAutomationRoadmap()` → GET `/process-intel/automation-roadmap`
- `discoverTech()` → POST `/process-intel/discover-tech`
- `getTechRadar()` → GET `/process-intel/tech-radar`
- `getTechSolution(solutionId: number)` → GET `/process-intel/tech-radar/${solutionId}`
- `getTechRoadmap()` → GET `/process-intel/tech-roadmap`
- `updateTechStatus(solutionId: number, params: { status: string })` → POST `/process-intel/tech-solution/${solutionId}/status`
- `getTechAlignment()` → GET `/process-intel/tech-strategic-alignment`

Update `index.ts` to export from `process-intel.ts` and `process-intel-types.ts`.

tasks.title: Market hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create React Query hooks and Zustand store for Market Intelligence and Competitor Intelligence.

**Store** (`market-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-market`.
State:
- `insightTypeFilter: string | null` (default null)
- `minRelevance: number` (default 0)
- `insightLimit: number` (default 20)
- `alertsShowAcknowledged: boolean` (default false)
- `signalDays: number` (default 30)
- `signalTypeFilter: string | null`
- `activeTab: 'dashboard' | 'alerts' | 'sources' | 'competitors'` (default 'dashboard')
- `sourcesExpanded: boolean` (default true)
- `refreshInterval: number` (default 0)
Actions: setter for each field, `toggleSourcesExpanded()`.

**Hooks** (`use-market.ts`):
Import API functions from `@gilbertus/api-client`. Import types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

Query hooks (useQuery):
- `useMarketDashboard(days?: number)` — queryKey: ['market-dashboard', days], staleTime: 60_000
- `useMarketInsights(type?: string, minRelevance?: number, limit?: number)` — queryKey: ['market-insights', type, minRelevance, limit]
- `useMarketAlerts(acknowledged?: boolean)` — queryKey: ['market-alerts', acknowledged]
- `useCompetitors()` — queryKey: ['competitors']
- `useCompetitorAnalysis(competitorId: number)` — queryKey: ['competitor-analysis', competitorId], enabled: !!competitorId
- `useCompetitorSignals(params?: { competitor_id?: number, signal_type?: string, days?: number })` — queryKey: ['competitor-signals', params]

Mutation hooks (useMutation):
- `useScanMarket()` — mutationFn: scanMarket, onSuccess: invalidate ['market-dashboard', 'market-insights', 'market-alerts']
- `useAddMarketSource()` — mutationFn: addMarketSource, onSuccess: invalidate ['market-dashboard']
- `useAddCompetitor()` — mutationFn: addCompetitor, onSuccess: invalidate ['competitors']
- `useScanCompetitors()` — mutationFn: scanCompetitors, onSuccess: invalidate ['competitors', 'competitor-signals']

tasks.title: Finance hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create React Query hooks and Zustand store for Finance, Costs, and Goals.

**Store** (`finance-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-finance`.
State:
- `selectedCompany: string | null` (default null = all)
- `goalsAreaFilter: string | null`
- `goalsStatusFilter: string | null`
- `activeTab: 'overview' | 'costs' | 'goals'` (default 'overview')
- `expandedCompanies: string[]` (default [])
- `refreshInterval: number` (default 0)
Actions: setters + `toggleCompanyExpanded(company: string)` (add/remove from array).

**Hooks** (`use-finance.ts`):
Query hooks:
- `useFinanceDashboard(company?: string)` — queryKey: ['finance-dashboard', company], staleTime: 60_000
- `useCostBudget()` — queryKey: ['cost-budget'], staleTime: 30_000
- `useGoals()` — queryKey: ['goals']
- `useGoalDetail(goalId: number)` — queryKey: ['goal-detail', goalId], enabled: !!goalId

Mutation hooks:
- `useAddFinanceMetric()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['finance-dashboard']
- `useAddBudget()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['finance-dashboard']
- `useEstimateCost()` — no invalidation needed
- `useCreateGoal()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['goals']
- `useUpdateGoalProgress()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['goals', 'goal-detail']

tasks.title: Process Intelligence hooks + store
tasks.description:
Create React Query hooks and Zustand store for Process Intelligence (all sub-modules).

**Store** (`process-store.ts`):
Zustand store with `persist` middleware, storage key `gilbertus-process`.
State:
- `processTypeFilter: string | null`
- `appStatusFilter: string | null`
- `techStatusFilter: string | null`
- `techTypeFilter: string | null`
- `activeSection: 'overview' | 'apps' | 'flows' | 'tech' | 'workforce'` (default 'overview')
- `appViewMode: 'inventory' | 'ranking' | 'costs'` (default 'inventory')
- `selectedEmployee: string | null` (person slug)
- `refreshInterval: number` (default 0)
Actions: setter for each.

**Hooks** (`use-process-intel.ts`):
Query hooks:
- `useProcessDashboard()` — queryKey: ['process-dashboard'], staleTime: 60_000
- `useBusinessLines()` — queryKey: ['business-lines']
- `useProcesses(type?: string)` — queryKey: ['processes', type]
- `useApps()` — queryKey: ['apps']
- `useAppAnalysis()` — queryKey: ['app-analysis']
- `useAppDetail(appId: number)` — queryKey: ['app-detail', appId], enabled: !!appId
- `useAppRanking()` — queryKey: ['app-ranking']
- `useFlows()` — queryKey: ['flows']
- `useOptimizations()` — queryKey: ['optimizations']
- `useAutomationOverview()` — queryKey: ['automation-overview']
- `useAutomationRoadmap()` — queryKey: ['automation-roadmap']
- `useWorkProfile(slug: string)` — queryKey: ['work-profile', slug], enabled: !!slug
- `useTechRadar()` — queryKey: ['tech-radar']
- `useTechSolution(id: number)` — queryKey: ['tech-solution', id], enabled: !!id
- `useTechRoadmap()` — queryKey: ['tech-roadmap']
- `useTechAlignment()` — queryKey: ['tech-alignment']

Mutation hooks:
- `useDiscoverBusinessLines()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['business-lines', 'process-dashboard']
- `useMineProcesses()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['processes', 'process-dashboard']
- `useScanApps()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['apps', 'process-dashboard']
- `useScanAppsDeep()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['apps', 'app-analysis', 'process-dashboard']
- `useAppCosts()` — returns data directly (POST that returns costs)
- `useMapFlows()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['flows']
- `useGenerateOptimizations()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['optimizations', 'process-dashboard']
- `useAnalyzeEmployee()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['work-profile', 'automation-overview']
- `useAnalyzeAllEmployees()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['automation-overview', 'automation-roadmap']
- `useDiscoverTech()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['tech-radar', 'tech-roadmap']
- `useUpdateTechStatus()` — onSuccess: invalidate ['tech-radar', 'tech-solution']

tasks.title: Market UI components
tasks.description:
Create 6 reusable UI components for the Market & Competitor modules in `packages/ui/src/components/market/`.

**1. insight-card.tsx**
Props: `{ insight: MarketInsight, expanded?: boolean, onToggle?: () => void }`
- Type badge (color-coded: price_change=blue, regulation=orange, tender=green, trend=purple, risk=red)
- Title + relevance score bar (0-1)
- Expandable description + impact section
- Companies as tags
- Relative timestamp

**2. alert-item.tsx**
Props: `{ alert: MarketAlert, onAcknowledge?: (id: number) => void }`
- Level icon (info=blue circle, warning=amber triangle, critical=red octagon)
- Message text + insight context
- Acknowledge button (disabled if already acknowledged, or if no onAcknowledge handler — backend not ready)
- Timestamp

**3. source-table.tsx**
Props: `{ sources: MarketSource[] }`
- Table columns: Nazwa, URL, Typ, Ostatni fetch, Status (active/inactive)
- source_type badge
- last_fetched as relative time (or 'Nigdy' if null)

**4. competitor-table.tsx**
Props: `{ competitors: Competitor[], onRowClick?: (id: number) => void }`
- Table columns: Nazwa, KRS, Branża, Monitoring, Sygnały (30d), Krytyczne, Ostatnia analiza
- watch_level as color badge (active=green, passive=amber, archived=gray)
- Signal counts with severity coloring
- Clickable rows → onRowClick

**5. swot-card.tsx**
Props: `{ analysis: SwotAnalysis }`
- 2x2 grid layout for Strengths (green), Weaknesses (red), Opportunities (blue), Threats (amber)
- Each quadrant: heading + bullet list of items
- Summary text below grid
- signals_count badge

**6. signal-timeline.tsx**
Props: `{ signals: CompetitorSignal[], showCompetitorName?: boolean }`
- Vertical timeline layout (line on left, items on right)
- Each item: type badge, severity badge, title, description
- Date on left side (or 'Brak daty' if null)
- source_url as external link icon
- Optional competitor name display (for all-signals view)

All components use Tailwind + CSS variables (--bg, --surface, --text, --accent, --border). Polish labels. Import types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Finance UI components
tasks.description:
Create 6 reusable UI components for the Finance module in `packages/ui/src/components/finance/`.

**1. budget-bar.tsx**
Props: `{ category: string, planned: number, actual: number, pct: number, currency?: string }`
- Horizontal bar: background = planned amount, fill = actual amount
- Color thresholds: green (<60%), amber (60-80%), red (>80%)
- Labels: category name (left), actual/planned amounts (right), percentage badge
- Currency suffix (default PLN)

**2. cost-trend-chart.tsx**
Props: `{ data: { month: string, total_usd: number, api_calls: number }[], forecast?: number }`
- Recharts `LineChart` with `ResponsiveContainer`
- Primary line: total_usd (var(--accent) color, #6366f1)
- Secondary line: api_calls (var(--text-muted), dashed)
- X axis: month labels
- Y axes: left = USD, right = calls
- If forecast provided: dashed horizontal line for current month forecast
- Custom tooltip showing both values
- Loading and empty states

**3. metric-card.tsx**
Props: `{ label: string, value: number | string, currency?: string, period?: string, source?: string, trend?: 'up' | 'down' | 'stable' }`
- Card with label at top, large value in center
- Currency suffix if provided
- Period and source in small text below
- Trend arrow icon (up=green, down=red, stable=gray)

**4. goal-card.tsx**
Props: `{ goal: StrategicGoal, onClick?: () => void }`
- Card layout: title, area badge (color per area), company tag
- Progress bar: current_value / target_value with percentage
- Status badge (on_track=green, at_risk=amber, behind=red, achieved=blue, cancelled=gray)
- Deadline with days remaining
- Clickable → onClick

**5. goal-progress-chart.tsx**
Props: `{ progress: GoalProgress[], targetValue: number, unit?: string }`
- Recharts `AreaChart` with `ResponsiveContainer`
- Area fill: progress values over time (var(--accent))
- Reference line: targetValue (dashed, var(--warning))
- X axis: dates
- Y axis: values with unit label
- Tooltip with value + note
- Loading and empty states

**6. budget-scope-table.tsx**
Props: `{ budgets: BudgetScope[], dailyTotal: number, alerts: CostAlert[] }`
- Daily total KPI at top
- Table: Zakres, Limit (USD), Wydano (USD), %, Hard limit, Status
- Status cell: colored badge (ok=green, warning=amber, exceeded=red)
- Alerts list below table

All components: Tailwind + CSS vars, Polish labels, import types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Process Intelligence UI components
tasks.description:
Create 9 reusable UI components for the Process Intelligence module in `packages/ui/src/components/process/`.

**1. business-line-card.tsx**
Props: `{ line: BusinessLine }`
- Card: name (bold), description below
- Importance badge (critical=red, high=orange, medium=amber, low=gray)
- Signals count, status badge, discovered_at

**2. process-card.tsx**
Props: `{ process: DiscoveredProcess }`
- Card: name, description truncated to 2 lines
- Type badge (color per process_type)
- Frequency badge
- Automation potential: horizontal bar (0-100%), color gradient (red→amber→green)
- Status badge

**3. app-table.tsx**
Props: `{ apps: AppInventoryItem[], onRowClick?: (name: string) => void }`
- Table: Aplikacja, Kategoria, Wzmianki, Zamiennik, Status
- Status badge (not_planned=gray, planned=blue, partial=amber, replaced=green, not_replaceable=red)
- Mentions as number with bar indicator
- Clickable rows

**4. app-ranking-table.tsx**
Props: `{ ranking: AppRankingItem[] }`
- Table: #, Aplikacja, Priorytet zamiany, Roczne oszczędności, Wykonalność
- Rank number (1-based, bold for top 3)
- Savings in PLN formatted
- Feasibility as percentage bar
- Priority as colored badge

**5. flow-table.tsx**
Props: `{ flows: DataFlow[] }`
- Table: Przepływ, Źródło, Kanał, Częstotliwość, Wolumen, Automatyzacja, Wąskie gardło
- Automation badge (manual=red, semi_auto=amber, automated=green, gilbertus=blue)
- Bottleneck badge (high=red, medium=amber, low=green)
- Volume as formatted number

**6. tech-radar-chart.tsx**
Props: `{ solutions: TechSolution[], onSolutionClick?: (id: number) => void }`
- Custom SVG quadrant chart (400x400)
- 4 quadrants labeled: Adoptuj (top-right), Testuj (top-left), Oceniaj (bottom-left), Wstrzymaj (bottom-right)
- Map status to quadrant: deployed→Adoptuj, approved→Testuj, proposed→Oceniaj, rejected/in_development→Wstrzymaj (in_dev goes to Testuj)
- Dots per solution, sized by ROI, colored by solution_type (build=blue, buy=green, extend=purple)
- Hover tooltip: name, ROI, savings
- Click → onSolutionClick
- Background quadrant colors (subtle fills)

**7. tech-solution-card.tsx**
Props: `{ solution: TechSolution, onStatusChange?: (id: number, status: string) => void }`
- Card: name, solution_type badge, status badge
- Metrics row: ROI ratio, dev hours, annual savings (PLN), payback months
- Strategic alignment score as stars or bar
- Risk notes (collapsible)
- Status action buttons (approve, reject) if onStatusChange provided

**8. roadmap-timeline.tsx**
Props: `{ roadmap: { quarter: string, items: { name: string, [key: string]: any }[] }[], labelKey?: string }`
- Vertical timeline grouped by quarter
- Quarter label on left, items on right
- Each item: name + optional metadata
- `labelKey` defaults to 'name' — allows reuse for tech roadmap and automation roadmap
- Visual: connecting line between quarters

**9. workforce-table.tsx**
Props: `{ candidates: { person_name: string, automatable_pct: number, replaceability_score: number, [key: string]: any }[], onRowClick?: (slug: string) => void }`
- Table: Osoba, Automatyzacja %, Zastępowalność, Rola
- automatable_pct as colored bar (same gradient as process automation)
- replaceability_score as colored indicator
- Clickable rows

All components: Tailwind + CSS vars, Polish labels, import types from `@gilbertus/api-client`.

tasks.title: Market pages (dashboard + alerts + sources)
tasks.description:
Create 3 Market Intelligence pages.

**1. market/page.tsx** — Market Dashboard
- `'use client'`
- RBAC: `<RbacGate roles={['director','board','ceo']} permission='data:read:department'>`
- Hooks: `useMarketDashboard()`, `useScanMarket()`, store: `useMarketStore`
- Layout:
  - Header row: "Rynek Energii" title + "Skanuj rynek" button (loading state during scan mutation)
  - KPI row (3 cards): total_insights, active_alerts, sources count (from dashboard.stats + dashboard.sources)
  - Stats by type: horizontal bar chart or badge grid showing insight counts by type

tasks.title: Process Intelligence pages (dashboard + apps + flows)
tasks.description:

tasks.title: Tech Radar + Workforce pages

    - Map status: deployed→Adoptuj, approved/in_development→Testuj, proposed→Oceniaj, rejected→Wstrzymaj

  - "Analizuj wszystkich" button: loading, toast with summary (analyzed count, total savings)

tasks.title: Update index.ts exports + sidebar navigation
tasks.description:
Update shared files to integrate Part 5 modules.

**1. packages/api-client/src/index.ts** — Add exports:
```typescript
export * from './market';
export * from './market-types';
export * from './finance';
export * from './finance-types';
export * from './process-intel';
export * from './process-intel-types';
```

**2. Sidebar navigation** — Find the sidebar component (likely `packages/ui/src/components/sidebar.tsx` or similar) and add navigation entries:
- "Rynek" section (icon: TrendingUp or similar):
  - Dashboard → `/market`
  - Alerty → `/market/alerts`
  - Źródła → `/market/sources`
  - Konkurencja → `/market/competitors` (board+ only)
  - Sygnały → `/market/competitors/signals` (board+ only)
- "Finanse" section (icon: DollarSign or similar):
  - Przegląd → `/finance`
  - Koszty → `/finance/costs`
  - Cele → `/finance/goals`
- "Procesy" section (icon: Workflow or similar):
  - Dashboard → `/process`
  - Aplikacje → `/process/apps`
  - Przepływy → `/process/flows`
  - Radar tech → `/process/tech-radar` (board+ only)
  - Siła robocza → `/process/workforce` (ceo only)

Use RBAC-aware navigation: hide items the user's role cannot access. Follow the existing sidebar pattern for role-gating nav items.

This task depends on all group 3 tasks being complete — it wires everything together.
